squad.name: Repo Maintainer (Dogfood Squad)
squad.description: Automated repository maintenance team. Designed to use free local models (GLM-4 Flash / Gemma 4) for repetitive, secure tasks (linting, basic security scanning, formatting) to save cloud tokens.

roles.name: SecurityScanner
roles.role: Monitor dependencies and execute local pre-push security gates (using local-tier LLM for secret extraction validation).

roles.name: LocalReviewer
roles.role: Perform fast, repetitive code reviews and linting directly via local GLM/Gemma models. Blocks passing to cloud if simple syntactical errors exist.

roles.name: DocumentationMaintainer
roles.role: Update README, ROADMAP, and CHANGELOG locally without wasting cloud tokens.
